author: lOrm
content: Fixed in commit 07a3dd1e (src/hooks/merge.rs). Replaced O(n*m) Vec::retain dedup with HashMap-keyed O(n+m) merge. Normalized None/Some("") matchers to a single key. Emit WARN log naming the replaced commands so silent overrides are visible. Three new tests cover collision semantics and key normalization. Mandated-refactor items #1, #2, #4 addressed; item #3 (merge_strategy config field) deferred — current Replace-only semantics match the documented contract.
